purpose: Single Vercel-readable Call Tracker contract. The browser reads one event feed plus one optional summary helper; reporting counts come from explicit countsAsDial, countsAsContact, countsAsMeetingSet, countsAsPostMeetingOutcome, and counts_as_* booleans, never from activity_kind alone.

eventFeed.plainEnglish: This is the one row-by-row feed for Vercel. Supabase can build it from multiple source tables, but the browser treats every row the same: proof fields plus count booleans.

summaryHelper.plainEnglish: This is only a convenience helper for totals. Dials and contacts must mirror the same event-feed booleans.

deprecatedAliases.total_events: Do not display as Dials. Use dials.
deprecatedAliases.spoke_with: Do not display as Contacts. Use contacts.

sourceFamilies.rawMeaning: Outbound call work and call dispositions from task activity.
Pipeline lifecycle transitions. Meeting Set lives here so it does not disappear after the meeting moves forward.
Post-meeting outcomes such as closed won, closed lost, no show, canceled, and reschedule pending.

ownershipContract.plainEnglish: A row can only be trusted for the dashboard when it carries active-operator materialization proof. Vercel should display these fields as proof, not recompute ownership.

cardBindings.plainEnglish: How many outbound attempts happened today.
How many meaningful contact/disposition outcomes happened today.
How many meetings were set today.

cardBindings.forbiddenRule: Do not display call_tracker_summary.total_events as Dials.
Do not display call_tracker_summary.spoke_with as Contacts.

domainOutcomeRules.plainEnglish: Call attempt 1 is an outbound dial but not a contact.
Call attempt 2 is an outbound dial but not a contact.
Call attempt 3 is an outbound dial but not a contact.
Unable to leave voicemail is dial only.
Not interested is a real contact outcome, not close lost.
Reached athlete, not parent, counts as dial and contact.
Too young is a contact outcome, not close lost.
Need to follow up is dial and contact.
Meeting Set counts as dial, contact, and meeting set.

cronMaterialization.plainEnglish: Run this with the call tracker cron/sync so Vercel always carries the same contract the domain code expects.

Spoke to - I need to follow up
